description.unified: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing Physical DMG. On Crit Hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. This skill’s DMG is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound]. Gains immunity to all DMG while the skill is in use.
Removes harmful effects from self and increases ATK by {0} and Critical Hit Chance by 500 for [20 sec->15sec].

Performs a series of attacks, dealing Physical DMG 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals Physical DMG and knocks the enemy far away. The DMG of this skill is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound], and all stacks are consumed on the final hit.
On a Critical Hit, increases ATK by {0} for 10sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10. [(removed) extra DMG to enemies with 10 Wounds].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but the [Crit Chance->Critical Hit Chance] increase effect is replaced with an effect that increases Critical Damage by [100%->65%], and damage dealt to bosses is increased by [25%->30%].

description.unified: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}% and increases [Armor Penetration by 800->Armor Penetration by 800] while casting. [P.Block chance reduction (removed)].
[Sharp End] Increases ATK Boost by 50% and recovers additional {0} MP upon a Crit Hit for the Skill's duration.
[Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}%, and [mana is recovered by 200->adds 1 Wound per attack] upon Crit Hit.

dark.unified: When using a skill, has a [???->10%] chance to increase your Critical Damage by [10%->7%]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: On each Crit Hit, increases own ATK Spd by [{0}->{0}%] and Crit DMG by {1}% for 15 sec. This effect stacks up to [5->8] times.

Summons the soul of Lightning Flash, Livatis for 12sec, increasing own ATK by [60%->45%]. During the duration, increases DMG of [Float Like a Butterfly] by [50%->25%] and [(added) [Shooting Star] by 25%].

2.from: Increases the duration of Skill by 5 sec and changes the Skill DMG Boost of Float Like a Butterfly to 100%.
